_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Monitor and optimize data application performance, including resource utilization analysis, query performance profiling, bottleneck identification, and capacity planning for growth.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-012 (OP, cosine: 0.490), TF-K-013 (TF, cosine: 0.447).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.477). Shared vocabulary: [capacity, monitor, performance]. DCWF-only terms [network] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, application, bottleneck, data, growth, identification] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.907 (P=0.937, R=0.879). P exceeds R by 0.058 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Monitor network capacity and performance." and "Monitor and optimize data application performance, including resource utilizatio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.570 > STS 0.477 (gap +0.092). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [capacity, monitor, performance] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.1%. Shared tokens: [capacity, monitor, performance]. DCWF-only: [network]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, application, bottleneck, data, growth, identification].

signals.detail: STS 0.477 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
